# Tribune Inc.

> Tribune builds autonomous operational infrastructure for regulated industries. We design, build, and train AI organizations for small and mid-size businesses, installed on hardware you own, proven with a formal Independence Test. Power that stays. Help that leaves.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://tribuneinc.com/index.md)
- [About Tribune](https://tribuneinc.com/about.md)
- [Functions](https://tribuneinc.com/functions.md)
- [Builds](https://tribuneinc.com/builds.md)
- [Contact](https://tribuneinc.com/reach-out.md)

## Usage

The HTML pages are canonical for public web indexing. The `.md` files are curated, machine-readable mirrors intended for AI systems and other text-oriented clients.
